---
title: "BonQuery"
subtitle: "Data for the greater good"
keywords: "Toronto shelter data, homelessness analytics, shelter capacity Toronto, humanitarian data, shelter system analysis, Oracle SQL, Oracle APEX, données refuges Toronto, itinérance Toronto"
---

Welcome. This site is in active development.

BonQuery is a humanitarian data project focused on civic-tech analysis
of public datasets — currently centered on Toronto's shelter system.

More content coming soon.
